# STM32F4 Clock Profile Matrix


| Subfamily group | STM32Cube headers | Max MHz | OverDrive @ max | Separate USB 48 MHz source | USB max MHz in common cfg | Lower SYSCLK for USB | Recommended label | Notes |
| --- | --- | ---: | :---: | :---: | ---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| F401xC/F401xE | STM32F401XC, STM32F401XE | 84 | - | - | 84 | - | `STM32F4_84MHZ` | 84 MHz line; USB can use main PLLQ without lowering SYSCLK. |
| F405/F407/F415/F417 | STM32F405XX, STM32F407XX, STM32F415XX, STM32F417XX | 168 | - | - | 168 | - | `STM32F4_168_180MHZ` | 168 MHz line; USB can use main PLLQ at full SYSCLK. |
| F410x/F411xE | STM32F410CX, STM32F410RX, STM32F410TX, STM32F411XE | 100 | - | - | 96 | Y | `STM32F4_96_100MHZ` | Older 100 MHz path; common USB config lowers SYSCLK to 96 MHz for valid 48 MHz. |
| F412x/F413xx/F423xx | STM32F412CX, STM32F412RX, STM32F412VX, STM32F412ZX, STM32F413XX, STM32F423XX | 100 | - | Y | 100 | - | `STM32F4_100MHZ` | 100 MHz line with CK48 mux; USB 48 MHz can come from a separate PLLI2S path. |
| F427/F429/F437/F439 | STM32F427XX, STM32F429XX, STM32F437XX, STM32F439XX | 180 | Y | - | 168 | Y | `STM32F4_168_180MHZ` | 180 MHz line, but common USB config uses the older main-PLL path and lowers SYSCLK to 168 MHz. |
| F446xx | STM32F446XX | 180 | Y | Y | 180 | - | `STM32F4_180MHZ` | 180 MHz line with CK48 mux; USB 48 MHz can come from a dedicated PLLSAI path at full SYSCLK. |
| F469xx/F479xx | STM32F469XX, STM32F479XX | 180 | Y | Y | 180 | - | `STM32F4_180MHZ` | 180 MHz line with CK48 mux; USB 48 MHz can come from a dedicated PLLSAI path at full SYSCLK. |

`OverDrive @ max` is `Y` when `HAL_PWREx_EnableOverDrive()` is needed to reach the family maximum frequency.
`Separate USB 48 MHz source` means the common configuration can generate USB 48 MHz without relying on the main PLLQ path.
`USB max MHz in common cfg` is the highest SYSCLK kept by the shared clock template while still providing a valid USB 48 MHz clock.

Source headers: `STM32Cube_FW\cmsis-device-f4\Include`
